case_title: MONESA FONG VS. SUNG WING CHUNG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FONG, MONESA AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, SUNG WING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FONG, MONESA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
